key_events.description: Technique executed on a GitHub Actions ephemeral Windows VM. Ephemeral runners are isolated per-job; no persistent outbound C2 or lateral movement observed across execution window.

osquery.name: t1569_001_proc_exec
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, parent, name, path, cmdline, cwd, uid, gid, on_disk FROM processes WHERE cmdline != '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1569_001_proc_events
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, parent, path, cmdline, uid, time FROM process_events ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100;

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 3 direct run(s), 2/2 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
